'''pawoto''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:foehn|foehn]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-w-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:foehn|foehn]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| pawoto
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:pæweteth|pæweteth]] || [[word:pæwetej|pæwetej]] || [[word:pæwetesh|pæwetesh]] || [[word:pæwete|pæwete]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:pawowototh|pawowototh]] || [[word:pawowotoj|pawowotoj]] || [[word:pawowotosh|pawowotosh]] || [[word:pawowoto|pawowoto]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:pawototh|pawototh]] || [[word:pawotoj|pawotoj]] || [[word:pawotosh|pawotosh]] || [[word:pawoto|pawoto]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:pawoftoth|pawoftoth]] || [[word:pawoftoj|pawoftoj]] || [[word:pawoftosh|pawoftosh]] || [[word:pawoftof|pawoftof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:pawototho|pawototho]] || [[word:pawotojo|pawotojo]] || [[word:pawotosho|pawotosho]] || [[word:pawotoko|pawotoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:pawototh|pawototh]] || [[word:pawotoj|pawotoj]] || [[word:pawotosh|pawotosh]] || [[word:pawoto|pawoto]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:pawotothol|pawotothol]] || [[word:pawotojol|pawotojol]] || [[word:pawotoshol|pawotoshol]] || [[word:pawotokol|pawotokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:pawotothotho|pawotothotho]] || [[word:pawotojojo|pawotojojo]] || [[word:pawotoshosho|pawotoshosho]] || [[word:pawotoko|pawotoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:pawotothon|pawotothon]] || [[word:pawotojon|pawotojon]] || [[word:pawotoshon|pawotoshon]] || [[word:pawotokon|pawotokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:pawotothoro|pawotothoro]] || [[word:pawotojoro|pawotojoro]] || [[word:pawotoshoro|pawotoshoro]] || [[word:pawotokoro|pawotokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|27df60f}}
